data.body:
[Kivotos Live Preview]

On Friday, April 11 at 18:00, Blue Archive’s 3.5-Year Anniversary Special Live will be taking place!
What kind of news could be waiting for you, Sensei?
Find out on April 11!

➡️ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=2787967
